title: Does music actually affect retail sales, or is it a myth? — Daniel Fox
meta_description: Yes, the research is strong, but it's conditional. From a 38% supermarket swing to a 140-store study that found no overall effect, here's the honest answer on whether store music moves sales.

schema.headline: Does music actually affect retail sales, or is it a myth?
schema.description: The honest answer on whether store music moves sales: real but conditional, from a 38% supermarket effect to a 140-store null result.
